data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: The site design aligns user expectations by mirroring common design patterns used by most major websites.
data.technical_spec: Follows standard UI/UX conventions for navigation, layout, and interaction.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Limits the number of choices and decisions that users need to make to enhance quick navigation.
data.technical_spec: Simplified menu structures and predictive search functions to reduce cognitive load.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Ensures that interactive elements are easily clickable and accessible on all devices.
data.technical_spec: Button size and spacing adhere to Fitts's criteria to improve usability.

data.title: Law of Simplicity
data.description: Uses a minimalist design to improve focus on core navigational elements and essential content.
data.technical_spec: Clean layout with ample white space and straightforward navigation.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Employs pleasing visual designs that positively influence user perceptions of functionality.
data.technical_spec: High-quality visuals, themed color palettes, and typography.
